tasks.pack: cargo run --manifest-path ../../../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts pack --manifest ../../../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.core@v1.json --manifest ../../../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.auth@v1.json --output ../../../generated/contracts/dist/catalog.v1.json --contracts-out ../../../generated/contracts/dist/contracts
